title: Greetings & Courtesy
description: Master crucial greetings, courtesy terms, and primary questions used daily.

title: Numbers, Days & Months
description: Learn to count, talk about days of the week, and mention months.

title: All About Me
description: Introduce yourself, state your age, nationality, and profession.

title: Family Members & Rooms
description: Talk about immediate family members and names of rooms in a house.

title: Staple Foods & Fruits
description: Essential vocabulary for everyday foods, fruits, and basic drinks.

title: Objects & Belongings
description: Identify common objects like keys, phones, wallets, and bags.

title: Colors & Basic Adjectives
description: Describe things using simple colors and everyday sizes or qualities.

title: The Verbs 'Ser' & 'Estar'
description: Master the two essential ways to say 'to be' in permanent and temporary situations.

title: The Verbs 'Ter' & 'Ir'
description: Learn to express possession (to have) and future intentions/movement (to go).

title: Pronouns & Connectors
description: Connect your thoughts using simple words like 'and', 'but', 'because', and subject pronouns.

title: Prices, Stores & Clothes
description: Learn to ask for prices, navigate local stores, and describe clothing items.

title: Ordering at a Restaurant
description: Master requesting dishes, ordering common drinks, and handling the bill.

title: Getting Around & Transport
description: Navigate streets, ask for directions, and use public transportation vocabulary.

title: Talking About the Weather
description: Describe hot, cold, or rainy days and discuss Brazil's diverse seasons.

title: Professions & Office Life
description: Identify common professions, office tools, and basic work routines.

title: Body Parts & Wellness
description: Name parts of the body, express physical pain, and visit a pharmacy.

title: Sports, Music & Free Time
description: Discuss your favorite sports, musical tastes, and casual weekend activities.

title: Essential Brazilian Slang
description: Sound like a native using universal expressions like 'legal', 'beleza', and 'cara'.

title: Regular -AR Verbs (Present)
description: Conjugate standard present-tense actions like talking, working, and studying.

title: Regular -ER & -IR Verbs (Present)
description: Master eating, drinking, writing, and opening verbs in the present tense.

title: Past Tense: The Simple Past
description: Begin narrating completed actions that already happened yesterday or last week.

title: Prepositions of Place
description: Specify exactly where things are using inside, outside, next to, or behind.

title: Making Requests & Commands
description: Politely ask people to do things or give clear, functional instructions.

title: From Morning to Night
description: Describe daily reflexive actions like waking up, showering, and going to sleep.

title: Invitations & Planning
description: Invite friends out, accept or decline politely, and schedule meeting places.

title: Agreeing & Disagreeing
description: Learn to share your thoughts, support ideas, or politely disagree with others.

title: Doubts & Certainty
description: Express when you are completely sure about something or when you feel uncertain.

title: Hotel Check-ins & Bookings
description: Navigate accommodations, request amenities, and handle hotel reception interactions.

title: Sightseeing & Attractions
description: Ask for recommendations, buy tour tickets, and explore iconic Brazilian destinations.

title: Moods & Emotional States
description: Go beyond basics to express feeling anxious, excited, frustrated, or relieved.

title: Social Media & Internet
description: Discuss apps, sharing content, online security, and daily internet usage.

title: Computers & Gadgets
description: Master essential terminology for hardware, software, files, and digital tools.

title: At the Bank & Money Matters
description: Navigate opening accounts, ATMs, currency exchange, and digital bank transfers (Pix).

title: At the Pharmacy & Post Office
description: Pick up prescription medications, describe symptoms deeply, or mail packages.

title: Safety & Urgent Situations
description: Essential phrases for reporting losses, contacting police, or handling accidents safely.

title: Describing Outfits & Styles
description: Discuss fashion preferences, fit, style trends, and various clothing materials.

title: Past Tense: The Imperfect Past
description: Learn to talk about continuous childhood habits and what you used to do.

title: Combining the Past Tenses
description: Master telling stories by interrupting continuous past actions with single past events.

title: The Simple Future Tense
description: Conjugate formal future verbs to express what will happen down the road.

title: The Conditional Tense
description: Express hypothetical actions, polite requests, and what you 'would' do.

title: Direct Object Pronouns
description: Avoid repetition by replacing nouns with compact structural objects like 'o', 'a', 'os', 'as'.

title: Describing Childhood Events
description: Practice connecting complex paragraphs to talk about memories and old times.

title: Talking About Your Weekend
description: Recount recent social events, gatherings, outings, and short trips naturally.

title: Comparing Things & People
description: Master saying 'more than', 'less than', and 'as good as' to weigh options.

title: Superlatives & Extremes
description: Express when something is the absolute best, worst, biggest, or smallest.

title: Modern Brazil: Economy, Society & Environment
description: Converse warmly about public policies, economic growth, and preserving Brazil's ecosystems.

title: Business & Professional Communication
description: Prepare for job interviews, lead office meetings, and draft formal emails beautifully.

title: Festivals & Regional Folklore
description: Explore the rich history behind Carnaval, Folclore, and traditional regional festivals.

title: Gastronomy & Culinary Arts
description: Dive into the origins of Feijoada, and practice recipe verbs to cook Brazilian classics.

title: Relationships & Social Nuances
description: Express romantic interests, build deep friendships, and resolve social misunderstandings calmly.

title: Gírias Cariocas (Rio de Janeiro)
description: Sound like a local from Rio de Janeiro using authentic slang like 'mermão' and 'irado'.

title: Gírias Paulistas (São Paulo)
description: Adopt authentic, urban slang from São Paulo like 'meu', 'bicho', and 'da hora'.

title: Life, Values & Ambition
description: Discuss ethical scenarios, personal milestones, setbacks, and motivational strategies.

title: Present Subjunctive Mastery
description: Express your hopes, wishes, and doubts with perfect present subjunctive structures.

title: Past & Future Subjunctive
description: Navigate complex conditional future states and hypothetical 'what-if' situations easily.

title: Advanced Sentence Structures
description: Connect ideas smoothly with relative pronouns and understand passive voice construction.

title: Debating & Media Literacy
description: Structure logical arguments, counter points politely, and analyze media advertisements.

title: Legal, Administrative & Relocation Essentials
description: Understand rental lease agreements, official visa processes, and formal service contracts.

title: Academic Writing & Oratory
description: Incorporate formal logic connectors, structure research ideas, and prepare executive presentations.

title: Literature, Poetry & Arts Critique
description: Analyze classic prose writers, interpret poetry rhythm, and critique cinema or theater.

title: Elite Persuasion & Public Speaking
description: Employ rhetoric tactics, emphasize arguments, and navigate challenging audience questions.

title: Idioms, Proverbs & Metaphors
description: Unpack deep historical proverbs and colorful animal-themed expressions like 'pagar o pato'.

title: Corporate Strategy & Leadership
description: Discuss startup tech trends, fiscal restructuring, and executive delegation frameworks.

title: Advanced Grammar & Nuances
description: Master inflected infinitives, formal pronoun configurations (mesoclisis), and crase rules.

title: Brazilian History & Political Eras
description: Analyze the impacts of the Colonial Baroque era, the old Republic, and democratization.

title: Science, Bioethics & Public Health
description: Converse about genetic editing, epidemiology, clinical trials, and medical policies.

title: Journalism, Satire & Irony
description: Evaluate investigative media pieces and master the subtext of satirical columns.

title: Sotaque & Gírias Mineiras
description: Delight in expressions from Minas Gerais like 'uai' and the friendly contraction of sentences.

title: Expressões do Nordeste
description: Master vibrant northeastern vocabulary including beloved terms like 'oxente' and 'vixe'.

title: Psychology & Philosophy
description: Deconstruct cognitive habits, defense mechanisms, existential questions, and identity models.

title: The Native Integration Exam
description: The ultimate test containing highly obscure idioms and rapid-fire conversational scenarios.
